owner_areas.implementation_theme: separate file_create, file_modify, file_delete, and source collector health
add safe file_read visibility for credential and sensitive-path access where platform permits
normalize network_connect, dns_query, remote address/domain, process attribution, and drop counters
normalize process_create with stable parent, command line, user, pid, and platform identity fields
add benign and suspicious fixtures plus promoted benchmark cases
normalize process_access, memory_event, image_load, access masks, and target process evidence
promote Tamandua-authored D&R candidates with explainable evidence and benign allowlists
normalize auth_event, failed_login, session_start, account_change, and privilege_change
retain source repo, commit, source IDs, source mix, and license class
normalize service_create, service_modify, scheduled_event, task, daemon, and launch item metadata
add context collectors for mail_access, secret_scan, resource_usage, and service_health
normalize registry_modify, directory_change, policy_object, and actor_user
